checks.stdout:
provider status surface audit: PASS
- AppModel exposes centralized providerCredentialStatuses for Claude and ChatGPT.
- SettingsView and SetupWizardView render status rows/cards from sanitized status view models.
- Setup/settings UI sources do not directly read session keys, cookie headers, or raw credential values.
- AppModelTests include provider status sanitization, prompt, and recovery-action coverage.
